title: There is no limit to perfection
description: Assembly of client resource packs and mods for visuals
body:
# There is no limit to perfection

Client assembly of resource packs and mods to improve the visual part of Minecraft, you will have the animations of mobs and the player changed, beautiful visual effects added, and some textures changed, and everything is done so that it does not go out of the vanilla style of Minecraft

In most cases the assembly can be customized for yourself.
